name: cashdealgoldbuyers
description_short: Cash Deal Gold Buyers is a jewelry and precious metals buyer operating in Los Angeles, New York, and Miami. They offer immediate cash for luxury watches, gold, silver, diamonds, and accessories.
description_long:
Cash Deal Gold Buyers is a multi-location precious metals and jewelry purchasing business with established operations in Beverly Hills (Los Angeles), Midtown Manhattan (New York), and downtown Miami. The company positions itself as a buyer of high-value personal items rather than a traditional pawn shop offering loans, though the website mentions providing "multiple loan options on all your merchandise."

The company's primary service is purchasing luxury items for immediate cash payouts. They specifically buy watches, jewelry (diamonds, rings, necklaces, bracelets, earrings), precious metals (gold, silver, sterling silver, bullion), coins, luxury bags and accessories, and gift cards. They emphasize providing appraisals across their three locations and claim to offer competitive pricing with a stated guarantee of "100% Customer Satisfaction."

Cash Deal Gold Buyers distinguishes itself through multi-location convenience, 24-hour phone availability (though in-person hours are 9 AM–5 PM), and focus on luxury items and high-value merchandise. The website emphasizes speed of service and same-day cash payouts, positioning themselves as serving customers in California, New York, and Florida.

Key limitations include minimal transparency about pricing methodology, no published rates or valuation formulas, and reliance on phone contact for appointments and quotes. The website contains repetitive content and limited substantive information about their evaluation process or specific terms. Like most jewelry buyers, valuations will be subjective and based on current market prices for precious metals and the appraisal of individual items.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multiple locations in major markets (Los Angeles, New York, Miami) for accessibility
24-hour phone availability for scheduling and inquiries
Purchases wide range of items including watches, jewelry, precious metals, coins, bags, and gift cards
No loan application process required—immediate valuation and cash offer model
Three distinct specialties highlighted: luxury watches, gold/silver coins, and luxury bags
cons: Website provides no published pricing, rates, or valuation methodology—pricing is entirely subjective and requires phone contact
Limited information about evaluation criteria, item condition requirements, or what determines final offers
No customer testimonials, reviews, or ratings visible on the website despite claims of 'What do our customers say?' section
Minimal transparency about the loan options mentioned; terms, interest rates, and conditions not disclosed
Website quality is poor with significant repetitive content, unclear navigation, and basic design suggesting limited business infrastructure
best_for: People needing immediate cash for jewelry or precious metals who value speed over maximizing resale value
Customers with luxury watches, high-end bags, or precious metal collections seeking local in-person appraisals
Those seeking alternative to online jewelry buyers who want face-to-face evaluation in major metropolitan areas
diagnosis: Cash Deal Gold Buyers is best for people in Los Angeles, New York, or Miami who need immediate cash for jewelry, watches, or precious metals and prefer local in-person evaluation. The main caveat is the complete lack of pricing transparency—final offers depend entirely on phone consultation and in-person appraisal, with no way to estimate value beforehand or compare against market rates.
services: Diamond and precious stone jewelry buying
Gold jewelry purchasing (rings, necklaces, bracelets, earrings)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 37 W 47th St STE 204, New York, NY 10036
